features.evidence: what you re looking at right here is the brand new flagship laptop from samsung the galaxy book 4 ultra and i m a huge samsung user i use the galaxy s24 ultra as my everyday phone the galaxy buds the galaxy watch a lot of samsung ecosystem so when i saw this new laptop came out i was really excited but in this video i want to go through a lot of different tests and figure out who this laptop is really for is this going to be a laptop for students for families for creators for just everyday people running a business who would really be using this laptop and there s a lot that i noticed from this laptop that i really really about it and a couple things that i really don t about it now let s start off with the physical design here just a quick rundown a quick tour of this this is a 16 in laptop right here it comes in a couple different colors this is gray right here it s a nice premium aluminum exterior it does collect some fingerprints not really that bad but looking at it in my studio right here i m definitely seeing some fingerprints and what i really is the logo on the left side it s a little more underst not a giant logo across the back and being on the left side i think it s a little bit unique additionally the logo not to talk about that too much doesn t matter that much but it looks cool it has different colors it shines in the light in a cool way i think it s pretty nice it s a nice modern looking laptop looking at the ports on the side this is obviously really important the first thing i noticed with any new laptop on the left side we have hdmi awesome i m going to be using that a lot we have two thunderbolt type c ports right there and i m really happy that we have that but this is is our first drawback with this laptop we don t have any on the right side so you re going to be charging with one of those ports and the other one presumably you ll plug in maybe an adapter maybe you ll plug it into another monitor whatever you plug into maybe even a hub i guess but what i don t is that you can t plug in on either side if you want to charge this in the in the the outlets on your right side you have to run the cable across your lap and plug in on the left side i i just wish we had a more balanced charging option here on the right side we have a headphone jack we have a full size usb type a port which i m really happy about my macbook does not have that and it s something that i find that if you re plugging into an old printer or maybe you have a security key there s a lot of things that still use a traditional usb type a port so having one is pretty nice and then we have our micro sd card slot some people gave this a lot of heat for not having a full size i think it depends on what you re doing with this if you are a smaller creator and you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a drawback for me personally to have that but most of my sd cards are micros inside of a fullsize sd anyway so i really can t complain about that going into a one finger test here if i just lift on the front we are able to open the laptop a pretty nice smooth hinge there it stays at any angle all the way down to wow probably only a couple where about probably four 3 degrees right there maybe it s when it starts to close okay so pretty solid hinge i really that and opening it up it seems to go pretty far open as well this is not a 360 laptop but it is a touchscreen now unlike last year s version and if we just do a quick typing test to see what the screen wobble looks wow very very little if you shake the if you shake the desk i think they did a good job for a laptop of this size with a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23

what you re looking at right here is the brand new flagship laptop from samsung the galaxy book 4 ultra and i m a huge samsung user i use the galaxy s24 ultra as my everyday phone the galaxy buds the galaxy watch a lot of samsung ecosystem so when i saw this new laptop came out i was really excited but in this video i want to go through a lot of different tests and figure out who this laptop is really for is this going to be a laptop for students for families for creators for just everyday people running a business who would really be using this laptop and there s a lot that i noticed from this laptop that i really really about it and a couple things that i really don t about it now let s start off with the physical design here just a quick rundown a quick tour of this this is a 16 in laptop right here it comes in a couple different colors this is gray right here it s a nice premium aluminum exterior it does collect some fingerprints not really that bad but looking at it in my studio right here i m definitely seeing some fingerprints and what i really is the logo on the left side it s a little more underst not a giant logo across the back and being on the left side i think it s a little bit unique additionally the logo not to talk about that too much doesn t matter that much but it looks cool it has different colors it shines in the light in a cool way i think it s pretty nice it s a nice modern looking laptop looking at the ports on the side this is obviously really important the first thing i noticed with any new laptop on the left side we have hdmi awesome i m going to be using that a lot we have two thunderbolt type c ports right there and i m really happy that we have that but this is is our first drawback with this laptop we don t have any on the right side so you re going to be charging with one of those ports and the other one presumably you ll plug in maybe an adapter maybe you ll plug it into another monitor whatever you plug into maybe even a hub i guess but what i don t is that you can t plug in on either side if you want to charge this in the in the the outlets on your right side you have to run the cable across your lap and plug in on the left side i i just wish we had a more balanced charging option here on the right side we have a headphone jack we have a full size usb type a port which i m really happy about my macbook does not have that and it s something that i find that if you re plugging into an old printer or maybe you have a security key there s a lot of things that still use a traditional usb type a port so having one is pretty nice and then we have our micro sd card slot some people gave this a lot of heat for not having a full size i think it depends on what you re doing with this if you are a smaller creator and you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a drawback for me personally to have that but most of my sd cards are micros inside of a fullsize sd anyway so i really can t complain about that going into a one finger test here if i just lift on the front we are able to open the laptop a pretty nice smooth hinge there it stays at any angle all the way down to wow probably only a couple where about probably four 3 degrees right there maybe it s when it starts to close okay so pretty solid hinge i really that and opening it up it seems to go pretty far open as well this is not a 360 laptop but it is a touchscreen now unlike last year s version and if we just do a quick typing test to see what the screen wobble looks wow very very little if you shake the if you shake the desk i think they did a good job for a laptop of this size with a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23

what you re looking at right here is the brand new flagship laptop from samsung the galaxy book 4 ultra and i m a huge samsung user i use the galaxy s24 ultra as my everyday phone the galaxy buds the galaxy watch a lot of samsung ecosystem so when i saw this new laptop came out i was really excited but in this video i want to go through a lot of different tests and figure out who this laptop is really for is this going to be a laptop for students for families for creators for just everyday people running a business who would really be using this laptop and there s a lot that i noticed from this laptop that i really really about it and a couple things that i really don t about it now let s start off with the physical design here just a quick rundown a quick tour of this this is a 16 in laptop right here it comes in a couple different colors this is gray right here it s a nice premium aluminum exterior it does collect some fingerprints not really that bad but looking at it in my studio right here i m definitely seeing some fingerprints and what i really is the logo on the left side it s a little more underst not a giant logo across the back and being on the left side i think it s a little bit unique additionally the logo not to talk about that too much doesn t matter that much but it looks cool it has different colors it shines in the light in a cool way i think it s pretty nice it s a nice modern looking laptop looking at the ports on the side this is obviously really important the first thing i noticed with any new laptop on the left side we have hdmi awesome i m going to be using that a lot we have two thunderbolt type c ports right there and i m really happy that we have that but this is is our first drawback with this laptop we don t have any on the right side so you re going to be charging with one of those ports and the other one presumably you ll plug in maybe an adapter maybe you ll plug it into another monitor whatever you plug into maybe even a hub i guess but what i don t is that you can t plug in on either side if you want to charge this in the in the the outlets on your right side you have to run the cable across your lap and plug in on the left side i i just wish we had a more balanced charging option here on the right side we have a headphone jack we have a full size usb type a port which i m really happy about my macbook does not have that and it s something that i find that if you re plugging into an old printer or maybe you have a security key there s a lot of things that still use a traditional usb type a port so having one is pretty nice and then we have our micro sd card slot some people gave this a lot of heat for not having a full size i think it depends on what you re doing with this if you are a smaller creator and you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a drawback for me personally to have that but most of my sd cards are micros inside of a fullsize sd anyway so i really can t complain about that going into a one finger test here if i just lift on the front we are able to open the laptop a pretty nice smooth hinge there it stays at any angle all the way down to wow probably only a couple where about probably four 3 degrees right there maybe it s when it starts to close okay so pretty solid hinge i really that and opening it up it seems to go pretty far open as well this is not a 360 laptop but it is a touchscreen now unlike last year s version and if we just do a quick typing test to see what the screen wobble looks wow very very little if you shake the if you shake the desk i think they did a good job for a laptop of this size with a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23

have that and it s something that i find that if you re plugging into an old printer or maybe you have a security key there s a lot of things that still use a traditional usb type a port so having one you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23

what you re looking at right here is the brand new flagship laptop from samsung the galaxy book 4 ultra and i m a huge samsung user i use the galaxy s24 ultra as my everyday phone the galaxy buds the galaxy watch a lot of samsung ecosystem so when i saw this new laptop came out i was really excited but in this video i want to go through a lot of different tests and figure out who this laptop is really for is this going to be a laptop for students for families for creators for just everyday people running a business who would really be using this laptop and there s a lot that i noticed from this laptop that i really really about it and a couple things that i really don t about it now let s start off with the physical design here just a quick rundown a quick tour of this this is a 16 in laptop right here it comes in a couple different colors this is gray right here it s a nice premium aluminum exterior it does collect some fingerprints not really that bad but looking at it in my studio right here i m definitely seeing some fingerprints and what i really is the logo on the left side it s a little more underst not a giant logo across the back and being on the left side i think it s a little bit unique additionally the logo not to talk about that too much doesn t matter that much but it looks cool it has different colors it shines in the light in a cool way i think it s pretty nice it s a nice modern looking laptop looking at the ports on the side this is obviously really important the first thing i noticed with any new laptop on the left side we have hdmi awesome i m going to be using that a lot we have two thunderbolt type c ports right there and i m really happy that we have that but this is is our first drawback with this laptop we don t have any on the right side so you re going to be charging with one of those ports and the other one presumably you ll plug in maybe an adapter maybe you ll plug it into another monitor whatever you plug into maybe even a hub i guess but what i don t is that you can t plug in on either side if you want to charge this in the in the the outlets on your right side you have to run the cable across your lap and plug in on the left side i i just wish we had a more balanced charging option here on the right side we have a headphone jack we have a full size usb type a port which i m really happy about my macbook does not have that and it s something that i find that if you re plugging into an old printer or maybe you have a security key there s a lot of things that still use a traditional usb type a port so having one is pretty nice and then we have our micro sd card slot some people gave this a lot of heat for not having a full size i think it depends on what you re doing with this if you are a smaller creator and you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a drawback for me personally to have that but most of my sd cards are micros inside of a fullsize sd anyway so i really can t complain about that going into a one finger test here if i just lift on the front we are able to open the laptop a pretty nice smooth hinge there it stays at any angle all the way down to wow probably only a couple where about probably four 3 degrees right there maybe it s when it starts to close okay so pretty solid hinge i really that and opening it up it seems to go pretty far open as well this is not a 360 laptop but it is a touchscreen now unlike last year s version and if we just do a quick typing test to see what the screen wobble looks wow very very little if you shake the if you shake the desk i think they did a good job for a laptop of this size with a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23

you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a drawback for me personally to have that but most of my sd cards are micros inside of a fullsize sd anyway so i really can t complain about that going into a one finger test here if i just lift on the front we are able to open the laptop a pretty nice smooth hinge there it stays at any angle all the way down to wow probably only a couple where about probably four 3 degrees right there maybe it s when it starts to close okay so pretty solid hinge i really that and opening it up it seems to go pretty far open as well this is not a 360 laptop but it is a touchscreen now unlike last year s version and if we just do a quick typing test to see what the screen wobble looks wow very very little if you shake the if you shake the desk i think they did a good job for a laptop of this size with a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23

99 being made by samsung there s always a ton of deals and sales out there and i will have affiliate links in the description below that at the very least can give you a pretty nice tradein value on this laptop so if you have any older laptop i think you get up to about 700 tradein credit so 2,300 or 2,400 on this laptop that s no small that s no pocket change it s obviously a lot of money but hopefully the tradeing could at least help you if you decide to buy this laptop now that being said 3,000 you 2,300 2400 all the way up to 3,000 that puts us in a very competitive category really do expect a lot from this laptop so far i said there s a lot that i about it physically just a couple drawbacks that i think you should be aware of now one last thing to mention from the keyboard aspect and the trackpad aspect obviously i said trackpad works well i it i wish it was haptic but it s fine but it does have a fingerprint sensor on the top right that s also your power button of course and so this uses the fingerprint sensor primarily when you re signing in for stuff as opposed to many other windows laptops which have windows hello based on the facial recognition this does not have facial recognition on the top so that minimizes the bezel a little bit but that gets us into this the display segment of this video so starting off with the ex around the display obviously starting with the bezels they are asymmetric so left and right are very thin and that s very nice but the top and bottom are definitely different the top is a little bit wider than the sides but narrower than the bottom and you can see the camera is absolutely microscopic just a really really tiny camera on here we ll get into a camera test in a second to see how well that can perform considering how tiny that is and of course we have a microphone to the right of that camera but i said no infrared sensors so we won t be getting face id up there then the display the display is probably the highlight of this laptop being made by samsung i think it s really no surprise samsung does a fantastic job with displays on all of their products so this is an amoled 2x display 2880 x800 so it s not quite a 4k display again as a content editor i i look for 4k displays personally but many people out there would be just fine with a 2880 by 1800 display really not a huge deal there otherwise it is 120 hz it gets reasonably bright but it is still amoled so not super bright but really great hdr great contrast really dark blacks on here so as far as color and watching media on here you re going to have a fan fantastic experience on this display and having touch screen on here i think is a big benefit i said i ve been primarily using a macbook pro recently and that doesn t have a touchscreen but coming back to this with a touchcreen it s just so much easier when you see something on screen maybe you have multiple monitors and you open up something on this screen rather than finding your mouse you just touch it you always know where your hand is it s so much easier in some situations similarly if you re trying to zoom in if you re on a map or something that there are plenty of conveniences with having a touchcreen now quick little test i m pretty sure this won t work but just double checking to see if an s pen does work on this i have the s pen from a galaxy tablet and it looks confirming it does not work on here so if you have an s pen don t plan on using that here it doesn t fold flat anyway so it makes sense that you wouldn t have that but again just a question that i might see in the comments anyway all right so a couple hardware tests i want to get into before we start talking about the internals of this and the software that it comes with the first test i want to get into is a camera test so let s open up the camera so i m in my studio right now obviously we have pretty ideal lighting right here i think the camera it looks good to me this is a 1080p webcam surprised with how tiny this webcam is we ll see how it does in low light but also let me know what the microphone sound on this i have to say i m not the biggest fan of the effects i feel my face is very softened here it also really heavily desaturates my face so i feel i look very very pale here the wall behind me looks extremely blue in real life with the camera you can see what it looks definitely not nearly that blue it is a white wall so the camera is not perfect but for a webcam is this passible also we do have some settings on here that you can use on many different things so auto automatic framing as we ve seen will if i move over here it zooms in and focuses on me and again this is the 1080p camera so this is going to be cropped down it s definitely not 1080p when it zooms in this and so then we can also turn on eye contact which helps you look you re always looking at see if it s doing that i i don t really i m not really sure what this is doing i think it s cuz i m looking down here and it makes it look i m looking at the camera this weirds me out so whoa yeah i i don t that i don t that but the settings there in case you want to use it and then we have background effects as well you can have a standard blur and it looks it s detecting hair fairly well obviously this is a pretty easy environment with a white wall behind me and we have portrait blur as well so slightly less blurry back ground portrait probably looks a little bit better but again it is still just a classic cutout see if i put something in front of me okay so yeah i don t know it does an okay job for webcam i have to say it s not too bad all right now let s get into a speaker test now i want to compare this side by side with a macbook pro or maybe some other laptops as well just to see generally how well it performs so as you can hear in the speaker test it does get reasonably loud very loud honestly it doesn t have the best base so it i don t think it s quite as good as a macbook pro in my opinion for the speakers but better than many other laptops of this size so speakers definitely get the job done but there s of course a headphone jack or bluetooth to connect to other speakers if you wanted to have a more professional setup for better audio quality so talking about the internals of this laptop we have two main configurations they re both running intel s ultra processors one is the seven one is the nine the seven s obviously going to be the cheaper one coming with 16 gigs of ram and the rtx 4050 and that one is going to be the 23

what you re looking at right here is the brand new flagship laptop from samsung the galaxy book 4 ultra and i m a huge samsung user i use the galaxy s24 ultra as my everyday phone the galaxy buds the galaxy watch a lot of samsung ecosystem so when i saw this new laptop came out i was really excited but in this video i want to go through a lot of different tests and figure out who this laptop is really for is this going to be a laptop for students for families for creators for just everyday people running a business who would really be using this laptop and there s a lot that i noticed from this laptop that i really really about it and a couple things that i really don t about it now let s start off with the physical design here just a quick rundown a quick tour of this this is a 16 in laptop right here it comes in a couple different colors this is gray right here it s a nice premium aluminum exterior it does collect some fingerprints not really that bad but looking at it in my studio right here i m definitely seeing some fingerprints and what i really is the logo on the left side it s a little more underst not a giant logo across the back and being on the left side i think it s a little bit unique additionally the logo not to talk about that too much doesn t matter that much but it looks cool it has different colors it shines in the light in a cool way i think it s pretty nice it s a nice modern looking laptop looking at the ports on the side this is obviously really important the first thing i noticed with any new laptop on the left side we have hdmi awesome i m going to be using that a lot we have two thunderbolt type c ports right there and i m really happy that we have that but this is is our first drawback with this laptop we don t have any on the right side so you re going to be charging with one of those ports and the other one presumably you ll plug in maybe an adapter maybe you ll plug it into another monitor whatever you plug into maybe even a hub i guess but what i don t is that you can t plug in on either side if you want to charge this in the in the the outlets on your right side you have to run the cable across your lap and plug in on the left side i i just wish we had a more balanced charging option here on the right side we have a headphone jack we have a full size usb type a port which i m really happy about my macbook does not have that and it s something that i find that if you re plugging into an old printer or maybe you have a security key there s a lot of things that still use a traditional usb type a port so having one is pretty nice and then we have our micro sd card slot some people gave this a lot of heat for not having a full size i think it depends on what you re doing with this if you are a smaller creator and you re using handheld maybe action cameras you re going to be having micro sd anyway and it s nice to not require a an adapter with you all the time or if you re a really large creator and you just mostly use drones and stuff that again sometimes it s nice to have a micro sd slot there for me i use a a regular slr style camera and so i always have full size sd cards i think it s a little bit of a drawback for me personally to have that but most of my sd cards are micros inside of a fullsize sd anyway so i really can t complain about that going into a one finger test here if i just lift on the front we are able to open the laptop a pretty nice smooth hinge there it stays at any angle all the way down to wow probably only a couple where about probably four 3 degrees right there maybe it s when it starts to close okay so pretty solid hinge i really that and opening it up it seems to go pretty far open as well this is not a 360 laptop but it is a touchscreen now unlike last year s version and if we just do a quick typing test to see what the screen wobble looks wow very very little if you shake the if you shake the desk i think they did a good job for a laptop of this size with a 16 in display typically you see a lot of screen wobble many manufacturers really struggle with that and so it s definitely there but pretty minimal i m really happy with that looking at the keyboard then it s a slightly different configuration than you might expect so we do have the numpad on the right side it s a little bit more compressed so if you re somebody that types a lot of excel sheets and you re really really used to a full size numpad it s going to take a beat to really get used to this but personally i having that over there i do use excel sheets a lot and so having a number pad i think is a big advantage for a power laptop this but that does shift our keyboard over to the left obviously and so it does again take a second to get used to this keyboard pretty nice tactile feel in them a little bit of a shallow travel not my favorite keyboard a little bit stiffer on them but again once you get used to it my typing speed was really quite fine with this laptop i guess i haven t mentioned this i ve been using this laptop for about two weeks now week and a half two weeks now and i ve been doing a lot with this i ve been using adobe premiere pro on here i have been obviously managing emails and doing a lot of other things editing insta 360 videos a lot of different stuff on here and it really handles it all quite well and i m pretty used to the keyboard by now the trackpad is a little bit left of center and it is very very large it s not a haptic trackpad i think that s a drawback for a laptop of this price which by the way the price here ranges from about 23
